title: Undying Pets
description: Keep your pets out of harms way by giving them a Totem of Undying
body:
# Undying Pets Datapack for Minecraft Java Edition 

## 📖 About
If you're tired of your pets jumping infront of you and you accidently smack them with your sword, or them getting in the way and dying  this datapack is for you.
## 📝 Features
This  datapack adds the ability to throw a Totem of Undying onto your pets incase they get killed in a fight or you accidently hit them.

You can also easily check which of your pets currently have a Totem.

## ❗Important Information
This pack makes it so pets can **only** pick up Totems and nothing else so you don't have to worry about them stealing your stuff.

The current list of Mobs that can be given Totems are as follows
- Wolves
- Cats
- Parrots
  
*This list may be expanded upon in the future so keep an eye on the changelog when new updates drop!*

To check which mobs already have a Totem just hold a totem in your Mainhand and the ones who have a Totem will glow!

## 📂 Installation
Be sure to install this Datapack to the right location or it will not work properly. 

The *correct* file path is **saves/[world]/datapacks** 

## ℹ️ Extra Information
I now have a Ko-fi link located on the pack’s Modrinth page on the sidebar, but always remember donations are appreciated, but **never** required.

## 👾 Bugs/Issues
Please report any issues to the Discord located in the Links tab, or on the Planet Minecraft page.
